title: Almond Irish Poached Oatmeal
description: A delicious and comforting breakfast dish made with poached oats, almond milk, and a hint of Irish flair.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the almond milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the rolled oats and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 5-7 minutes, or until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid.
Stir in the Irish butter and sweetener (if using).
Season with salt and cinnamon (if using).
Serve hot, topped with additional sweetener or cinnamon if desired.
Prepare a poaching liquid by bringing 2 cups of water to a boil in a small saucepan.
Reduce heat to a simmer and add a pinch of salt.
Poach the oats for 2-3 minutes, or until they have absorbed most of the liquid and have a creamy consistency.
Serve the poached oats over the cooked oatmeal and enjoy!
